Class LongValidatorImpl

com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberValidator<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractIntegerValidator<IntegerValidator<Long>,Long>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.LongValidatorImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<IntegerValidator<Long>,Long>, ExtensibleIntegerValidator<IntegerValidator<Long>,Long>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<IntegerValidator<Long>,Long>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<IntegerValidator<Long>,Long>, IntegerValidator<Long>
public final class LongValidatorImpl extends AbstractIntegerValidator<IntegerValidator<Long>,Long> implements IntegerValidator<Long>
Default implementation of IntegerValidator<Long>.

  • Constructor Details

    • LongValidatorImpl

      public LongValidatorImpl(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Long actual, List<ValidationFailure> failures, boolean fatalFailure)
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      name - the name of the value
      actual - the actual value
      failures - the list of validation failures
      fatalFailure - true if validation stopped as the result of a fatal failure
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if scope, config, name or failures are null. If name is blank.
